---
name: "Language parity request"
about: "A topic exists in one language layer but not the other"
title: "Parity: [slug]"
labels: ["parity"]
---

## Which page exists and which is missing?

- Exists: <!-- e.g. wiki-en/concepts/coinjoin.md -->
- Missing: <!-- e.g. wiki-ru/concepts/coinjoin.md -->

## Notes

<!-- Optional: anything specific the missing page should cover, or differences you noticed between the existing
     page and what you'd expect in the other language. Remember: RU and EN pages are independent syntheses
     from the same raw/ sources — not translations of each other. -->
